query:
SELECT p.id, p.batch_no, p.po_number, p.vendor_name, p.imported_category_name, p.imported_brand_name, p.category_id, p.current_station_code, p.current_status, pc.category_name AS assigned_category_name, pc.brand_name AS assigned_brand_name, pc.subtype_code AS assigned_subtype_code FROM products p LEFT JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.id = p.category_id WHERE p.batch_no = '00500025282';
SELECT se.id, se.station_code, se.event_type, se.business_date, se.operator_user_id, se.category_id, se.subtype_code, se.count_for_productivity, psd.id AS detail_id, psd.target_config_id, psd.earned_points FROM station_events se LEFT JOIN products p ON p.id = se.product_id LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.station_event_id = se.id WHERE p.batch_no = '00500025282' ORDER BY se.id ASC;
command:

SELECT se.id, se.station_code, se.event_type, se.business_date, se.operator_user_id, se.category_id, se.subtype_code, se.count_for_productivity, psd.id AS detail_id, psd.target_config_id, psd.earned_points FROM station_events se LEFT JOIN products p ON p.id = se.product_id LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.station_event_id = se.id WHERE p.batch_no = '00500025282' ORDER BY se.id ASC;
